name: tradingview-mcp
description: MCP bridge for TradingView Desktop via Chrome DevTools Protocol

scripts.test: node --test tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/sanitization.test.js tests/pine_lifecycle.test.js tests/pine_editor_selection.test.js tests/pine_delete.test.js tests/chart_deps.test.js tests/drawing_deps.test.js tests/dialog.test.js tests/ui.test.js
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/pine_analyze.test.js tests/cli.test.js tests/sanitization.test.js tests/pine_lifecycle.test.js tests/pine_editor_selection.test.js tests/pine_delete.test.js tests/chart_deps.test.js tests/drawing_deps.test.js tests/dialog.test.js tests/ui.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/watchlist.core.test.js tests/chart.core.test.js tests/data.core.test.js tests/pine.core.test.js tests/drawing.core.test.js tests/alerts.core.test.js tests/smoke.core.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
